overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy night in a historic New Orleans-inspired city (Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2). The player moves from open cobblestone streets with tram tracks into covered sidewalks past sheltering NPCs, then enters a building courtyard. The atmosphere is moody with gas lamp lighting reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rainy cobblestone street between historic brick buildings

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with wrought iron balconies and lit windows
weathered brick facade with wooden shutters and balcony
cast iron gas lamp illuminating the rain
metal rails embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic city street. The camera moves forward along wet cobblestones with visible tram tracks, flanked by multi-story brick buildings with wrought iron balconies. Gas lamps cast a warm glow through the heavy rain, creating reflections on the wet ground.

events.description: moves from open street into covered sidewalk area under building awnings

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered boardwalk, passing NPCs taking shelter from the rain

notable_agents.action: man in hat and coat standing under awning taking shelter from rain

entered.detail: overhanging roof structure providing shelter from rain
empty wooden pushcart parked on the sidewalk
black posts with yellow tops lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the covered sidewalk awnings, transitioning from exposed rain to sheltered walkway. NPCs stand against the building walls avoiding the rain. A wooden cart and metal bollards line the path as warm light spills from doorways.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with prominent signage

events.description: exits covered walkway back into open rain on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the prominent B.K. Sellers building

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench outside the B.K. Sellers building

entered.detail: three-story brick building with prominent 'B. K. SELLERS' signage and balcony

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the camera returns to the open rainy street. The B.K. Sellers building dominates the left side with its prominent signage, while tram tracks continue down the cobblestone road. A lone figure sits on a bench outside the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: quiet historic street approaching building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward a building entrance with blue doors

entered.detail: blue double doors with 'ENTRANCE' sign above leading into building
black and white checkered tile pattern visible through doorway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the quieter section of street, approaching a building entrance with distinctive blue doors. The checkered floor pattern is visible inside the doorway, and the B.K. Sellers building recedes behind as the camera moves forward.

events.description: enters building through archway with checkered floor hallway
emerges from dark hallway into warmer lit interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway and descending steps into the interior courtyard

notable_agents.action: man in vest standing near the interior entrance

entered.detail: ornate multi-tiered stone fountain in the center of the courtyard
large planters with greenery flanking the courtyard entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the building through the blue doorway, passing through a checkered floor hallway into a beautiful interior courtyard. The space opens up to reveal a central stone fountain and potted plants, with warm light emanating from the building's interior windows and doorways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked historic city street into the sheltered sanctuary of a private interior courtyard. It begins by moving along wet cobblestones and tram tracks, where gas lamps cast warm reflections through a heavy downpour beneath wrought iron balconies. As the camera glides under covered sidewalk awnings, the environment shifts from the exposed rain to a sheltered walkway lined with wooden carts and NPCs seeking cover. The scene then opens back onto the rainy street, passing the prominent signage of the B.K. Sellers building and a lone figure on a bench before approaching a set of distinctive blue doors. Finally, the camera crosses a checkered floor hallway and enters a serene interior courtyard, where the urban noise fades into a space centered around a stone fountain and lush potted plants.
